tasks.label: clean-generated-content
args: $root = 'c:\Personal\Genel\Projeler\GlobalProtocolHistoricalMod\Content'; $dirs = @('AppBundle','wasi-wasm'); foreach ($dir in $dirs) { $path = Join-Path $root $dir; if (Test-Path $path) { Remove-Item $path -Recurse -Force } }; $extensions = @('*.dll','*.pdb','*.deps.json','*.runtimeconfig.json','*.wasm','*.a','*.dat','*.c','*.h','*.rsp','*.wit','*.bin'); foreach ($pattern in $extensions) { Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter $pattern -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'goals_old_world_order.json' } | Remove-Item -Force }; Write-Host 'Cleaned generated content artifacts.'

tasks.command: $root = "c:\Personal\Genel\Projeler\GlobalProtocolHistoricalMod\Content"; $dirs = @("AppBundle","wasi-wasm"); foreach ($dir in $dirs) { $path = Join-Path $root $dir; if (Test-Path $path) { Remove-Item $path -Recurse -Force } }; $extensions = @("*.dll","*.pdb","*.deps.json","*.runtimeconfig.json","*.wasm","*.a","*.dat","*.c","*.h","*.rsp","*.wit","*.bin"); foreach ($pattern in $extensions) { Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter $pattern -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "goals_old_world_order.json" } | Remove-Item -Force }; Write-Host "Cleaned generated content artifacts."
